Executive Summary
ABOVE TARGET: Ion Solar's collection rate of 98.10% is marginally above the 98% LightReach target. 22 past-due accounts totaling $10,786 require monitoring. NPS data is not yet available. Focus on preventing aging migration to maintain the 98%+ threshold.
  • Collection rate 98.10% -- marginally ABOVE the 98% LightReach target (+0.10%)
  • 22 past-due accounts (30+ days) totaling $10,786 across 825 PTO'd accounts
  • Western market concentration: UT, AZ, NV, CO, NM, TX
  • NPS not yet available -- recommend activation for complete performance profile
  • Thin margin above target requires proactive monitoring to prevent slippage
  • 825 accounts represents significant portfolio scale -- collections discipline critical

Monitoring Actions
  • Weekly monitoring of 22 past-due accounts to prevent aging migration
  • Activate NPS surveys for all 825 accounts within 2 weeks
  • ACH enrollment verification for delinquent accounts
  • Alert if collection rate dips below 98% on any weekly check
  • Proactive outreach for any account approaching 60 days
Palmetto LightReach  |  Confidential  |  March 2026
Phased Implementation

Maintain Performance

  • Weekly delinquency monitoring
  • Proactive outreach at 45-day mark
  • ACH re-enrollment for dropped accounts
  • Monthly trend review with PLR RM
  • Alert if rate drops below 98%

Growth Opportunities

  • NPS activation for complete profile
  • Energy Backup cross-sell in western markets
  • Channel tier evaluation post-NPS
  • Volume growth in UT/AZ/CO markets
  • Solar 3.0 positioning for all product lines
Palmetto LightReach  |  Confidential  |  March 2026
Key Takeaways
  • ABOVE TARGET BUT THIN MARGIN: 98.10% is only 10 basis points above the 98% threshold. Requires vigilant monitoring.
  • 22 PAST-DUE ACCOUNTS NEED ATTENTION: $10,786 in exposure must not be allowed to age. Weekly tracking essential.
  • NPS NOT YET ACTIVE: 825 accounts provide ample sample size. Activate immediately for complete performance profile.
  • WESTERN MARKET STRENGTH: UT/AZ/NV/CO footprint positions Ion well for battery and Solar 3.0 products.
  • MAINTAIN AND GROW: This is a monitoring story, not a corrective one. Protect the 98%+ rate and expand.
